question.text: A clearing member can withdraw funds from clearing accounts only in:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Clearing members can deposit funds in any form but can withdraw funds only in self-name. **The Trap:** Deposits can come from anywhere (margin deposits, etc.) but withdrawals are restricted to self-name only. **Cross-Exam Context:** This restriction prevents misuse of clearing accounts for unauthorized withdrawals. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** This safeguard ensures clearing funds are not diverted to third parties.
